parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gda_doc_inbox (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  doc_type TEXT DEFAULT 'rfp',
  content TEXT,
  source_url TEXT,
  file_name TEXT,
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending',
  chunks_created INT DEFAULT 0,
  error_message TEXT,
  opp_id INT,
  metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  processed_at TIMESTAMPTZ
)

SELECT id, title, doc_type, content, source_url, file_name, opp_id, metadata
FROM gda_doc_inbox
WHERE status = 'pending'
ORDER BY created_at ASC
LIMIT 5

INSERT INTO gda_pgvector_docs (doc_type, source_id, title, content, metadata, embedding)
SELECT 
  $1, $2, $3, $4, $5::jsonb,
  (SELECT embedding FROM gda_pgvector_docs ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT 1)
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM gda_pgvector_docs WHERE source_id = $2 AND doc_type = $1)
UPDATE gda_doc_inbox SET status = 'indexed', chunks_created = $1, processed_at = NOW() WHERE id = $2

INSERT INTO gda_doc_inbox (title, doc_type, content, source_url, file_name, opp_id, metadata)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7)
RETURNING id, title, status

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'queued', doc_id: $input.first().json[0] ? $input.first().json[0].id : null, message: 'Document registered. Will be auto-indexed within 15 minutes.' }) }}
